title: Pi Mention Project settings
description: Settings for project mentions and project discovery.

$schema.description: JSON Schema used by editors for this settings file.

trigger.description: Single character that starts a project mention.

roots.description: Project root directory or directories searched for projects.

gitReposOnly.description: Include only directories containing Git repositories.

includeDotFolders.description: Include project directories whose names start with a dot.

completionSuffix.description: Text inserted after a completed project mention.
